about.title: The Project
about.leadBold: P.IR.A.M.iD. (Path for Intercultural Awareness, Measurement and Development)
about.leadRest: aims to structure the intercultural competencies of VET students and teachers in the tourism sector.
about.body: By collaborating directly with tourism companies through training activities and transnational mobilities, we raise awareness and provide applicable tools for defining and assessing critical competences.

objectives.title: Our Objectives
objectives.subtitle: The P.IR.A.M.iD project is built on a foundation of integration and skill development within the European tourism sector.

integration.title: Integration & Inclusion
integration.desc: Promote integration, inclusion and well-being in intercultural contexts.

dialogue.title: Intercultural Dialogue
dialogue.desc: Encourage and activate intercultural dialogue and intercultural skills.

innovative.title: Innovative Methods
innovative.desc: Experiment innovative methodologies and tools for skill acquisition.

vet.title: VET Teaching
vet.desc: Increase and improve the recognition of intercultural competences in teachers.

company.title: Company Awareness
company.desc: Allow tourism companies to disseminate project results internally and externally.

cooperation.title: Cooperation
cooperation.desc: Strengthen cooperation between target groups and partners from different countries.

european.title: European Dimension
european.desc: Strengthen the European dimension to become responsible future citizens.

skill.title: Skill Recognition
skill.desc: Improve intercultural, linguistic, and social skills through project activities.

partners.title: Partners
partners.subtitle: A strategic partnership of five organizations across Europe dedicated to intercultural measurement and development in the tourism sector.

results.title: Project Results
results.subtitle: Explore the tangible outcomes and educational tools developed throughout the PIRAMID project lifespan.

survey.title: P.IR.A.M.iD. Survey Report & Theoretical Model
survey.description: Delivery of a survey to define the realisation of the model. Access the documentation in your preferred language.

index.title: P.IR.A.M.iD. Intercultural Index
index.description: Development of the Intercultural index (validated test). Measure your intercultural awareness through our platform.

workPackages.title: Work Packages
workPackages.subtitle: The project is structured into four main development phases, ensuring scientific rigor and practical application in real-world tourism settings.

wp1.title: Survey & Model
wp1.desc: Delivery of a survey to define the realization of the model and theoretical framework.

wp2.title: Intercultural Index
wp2.desc: Development and validation of a standardized test to measure intercultural competences.

wp3.title: Training Course
wp3.desc: Comprehensive modules for students, VET teachers, and host company tutors.

wp4.title: Training Mobility
wp4.desc: Realization of physical transnational mobilities for students and educators.

news.title: Latest News
news.subtitle: Stay updated with the latest events, training launches, and project milestones from across the PIRAMID consortium.

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.subtitle: Subscribe to our newsletter to receive the latest news and updates about the P.IR.A.M.iD. project.
newsletter.successMessage: Your subscription has been successful. Welcome to our community!

footer.funded: Funded by the Erasmus+ Programme of the European Union. Project ID: 2023-1-ES01-KA220-VET-000157060

allNews.title: All News
allNews.subtitle: Browse every update, event and milestone from the PIRAMID consortium.

newsDetail.projectSummaryText: PIRAMID is an Erasmus+ project focused on intercultural awareness in the tourism industry.
newsDetail.newsletterText: Stay informed about upcoming events and project milestones.
